Soil/Rock Description: Wash boring (0.00-1.00m). Inspection pit (0.00-2.00m). No material description beyond 2.00m.

Moderately strong, brownish grey spotted yellow, moderately fine-grained DECOMPOSED GRANITE with closely spaced, extremely narrow rough undulang, limonite and Manganese stained joints, dipping 15°-35°
Strong, pinkish grey spotted black, slightly decomposed, medium-grained GRANITE, with closely to medium spaced, rough undulang, generally narrow, clean joints, dipping 5°-10°.
